name: Renais
bio:
Valiant Heavenly Warrior known by all for his fearlessness and tactical wisdom. He purifies enemies with a spear and illuminates lost souls with his virtue.

Role: Physical Counterattack
Specialty: A front-midline Counterattack-type hero that can launch Counterattacks when allies take damage; gradually increases its own ATK and lifesteal as turns progress.

skillSlots.name: Judgment Blow
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy with the highest [Quash] stacks twice, each dealing 170% P.DMG and has a 60% chance to apply [Holy Seal].

skillSlots.name: Divine Spear Verdict
skillSlots.description: <color=#FFEB04>Passive</color>: Replaces Basic Attack with [Divine Spear Verdict]; when ally heroes are attacked, Renais casts [Divine Spear Verdict].

effects.name: Lance of War God
effects.description: Each attack or counterattack grants 1 stack of [Momentum] to self.

effects.name: Lance of War God
effects.description: Each attack or counterattack inflicts 1 stack of [Quash] on the target; when attacking enemies with [Quash], it deals additional P.DMG equal to 25% ATK × [Quash] stacks.

effects.name: Lance of War God
effects.description: When attacking enemies with [Quash], this attack grants an additional 30% Crit Rate.

effects.name: Lance of War God
effects.description: [Divine Spear Verdict]’s trigger count is increased to 5.
